choices.text: cv_bridge converts sensor_msgs/Image → OpenCV ndarray. Then YOLO/SAM/CLIP for detection/segmentation. Calibrate intrinsics (focal/distortion) + extrinsics (camera→base via AprilTag + solvePnP).
Open3D / PCL pipeline: voxel downsample → RANSAC plane segment (ground) → DBSCAN cluster (objects) → ICP/NDT register multi-scans. PointCloud2 = ROS format.

questions.explanation: Open3D pipeline for point cloud processing.

choices.text: robot_localization package: EKF/UKF nodes combine wheel odom + IMU + GPS + visual via YAML config. Each sensor's axes specified. AMCL particle filter for known-map localization.

questions.explanation: robot_localization for fusion; AMCL for known maps.

choices.text: Front-end (features: visual keypoints / LiDAR edges) + back-end (pose graph optimization via g2o/GTSAM) + loop closure (revisit detection corrects drift). Cartographer, ORB-SLAM3, SLAM Toolbox common.

Loop closure: detect revisited places via feature matching → add graph constraint → optimization redistributes error globally. Map snaps to consistent geometry. Without it, drift accumulates linearly with distance.
